required_skill_areas.kubernetes: Work with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, Kubernetes) to deliver scalable, high-availability applications.
required_skill_areas.security: Strong knowledge of security architecture: LDAP, Active Directory, SAML, OAuth2, OpenID Connect.
required_skill_areas.distributed_systems: Background in cloud infrastructure and distributed systems (AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform).
required_skill_areas.frontend: Proficient in Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
required_skill_areas.infrastructure_as_code: Work with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, Kubernetes) to deliver scalable, high-availability applications.

evidence.primary_role_motion: Experience in a GTM-adjacent engineering role, whether as a Forward Deployed Engineer, Sales Engineer, Solutions Engineer, or similar. You know how to navigate a sales cycle without losing your technical integrity.
evidence.deployment_environment: Vercel gives developers the tools and cloud infrastructure to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web.
evidence.target_customer_industry: Vercel helps customers like Ramp, Supreme, PayPal, and Under Armour build for the AI-native web.
evidence.ai_ml_depth: Power user of AI coding tools. You use v0, Cursor, Claude, Codex, or equivalent daily and have a current, working understanding of the AI coding landscape: agents, MCP, context management, local vs. remote execution.
evidence.customer_engagement_depth: Own end-to-end implementations with enterprise customers, from kickoff through production, working through whatever obstacles come up along the way.
evidence.target_user_persona: Vercel gives developers the tools and cloud infrastructure to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web.
evidence.solution_customization_level: Implement identity synchronization and lifecycle management solutions using SCIM, SSO, SAML, and other enterprise standards.

programming_languages.typescript: Proficient in Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
